task_completion.description: Write the SQL to create the v_track_bitrates view with correct columns and formula
task_completion.visual_evidence: A SQL editor shows a CREATE VIEW v_track_bitrates statement. The SELECT clause must include TrackId, Name, Composer, MediaType, Genre, and a calculation for BitrateKbps using the formula (Bytes * 8) / Milliseconds (with rounding), along with JOINs to the media_types and genres tables.

task_completion.description: Exclude video files in the view definition

task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the view was created, or the v_track_bitrates view appearing in the database schema/navigator pane.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or IDE showing a SQL file saved to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/genre_quality.sql. The query should group by Genre, calculate the average bitrate, and use ORDER BY ... DESC LIMIT 5.
